\tzpentry{ID4854}{Holonomy Pi Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4854 introduces Holonomy Pi Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\mathcal{W}_T = \\frac{1}{2\\pi i} \\oint_{\\mathcal{L}} \\frac{d}{dz} \\left( \\log \\det [ \\mathbf{M}(z, \\Psi) ] \\right) \\, dz \\in \\mathbb{Z}$$
